title: Nickify
description: This plugin allows you to mass nick a large number of players or a single player.
body:
# Information
RandomNick is a powerful and flexible nickname plugin designed for Minecraft servers that want seamless, automatic player nicking. Whether you need to randomly nick a single player or instantly disguise a large group, Nickify handles it smoothly and efficiently.

With advanced randomization, customizable name pools, and full control over who gets nicked, this plugin is perfect for events, competitive servers, staff anonymity, server recordings, or just adding fun unpredictability to your server.

**Another needed dependency is ProtocolLib https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/**

🔹 Features

🎲 Randomly nick a single player with one command

👥 Randomly nick multiple players or the entire server at once

🔄 Smart name selection (no duplicates)

⚡ Optimized for large servers

🛡 Permission-based control

**Perfect For**

Competitive practice servers

Events & tournaments

Staff disguise systems

Minigame servers


RandomNick makes player identity management effortless, fast, and professional — whether you're nicking one player or hundreds at a time.

## Commands

```
/randomnick <player|*>
```

```
/unnick <player|*>
```

```
/nickuser <player> <nickname>
```

```
/unnickuser <player>
```
## Permissions
All permissions default to OP

```
/randomnick = randomnick.randomnick
```

```
/unnick = randomnick.unnick
```

```
/nickuser = randomnick.nickuser
```

```
/unnickuser = randomnick.unnickuser
```
